Publications

2026

Miranda Brooke Rose, Santiago José Elías Velazco, Helen M Regan, James H Thorne, Janet Franklin. 2026. Species-Specific Responses to Multiple Climatic Variables Predict Diverging Locations of Future Climate Change Refugia. Diversity and Distributions, 32(2), e70158.

2025

Megan K Jennings, Amber Pairis, Althea Walker, William Madrigal Jr, Diane Terry, Joelene Tamm, Connor Magee, Alexandra Hoff, M Brooke Rose, Gregory A Backus, others. 2025. Climate Transformation and Stewardship: Reflections on Meaningful Collaboration to Support Indigenous-Led Research. Ecology and Evolution, 15(12), e72715.

Gregory A Backus, M Brooke Rose, Santiago JE Velazco, Janet Franklin, Alexandra D Syphard, Helen M Regan. 2025. Population Decline for Plants in the California Floristic Province: Does Demography or Geography Determine Climate Change Vulnerability?. Diversity and Distributions, 31(8), e70067.

2024

Clarissa S Rodriguez, Miranda Brooke Rose, Santiago José Elías Velazco, Janet Franklin, Loralee Larios. 2024. High potential for Brassica tournefortii spread in North American introduced range, despite highly conserved niche. Biological Invasions, 26(1), 337–351.

Santiago José Elías Velazco, Miranda Brooke Rose, Paulo De Marco Jr, Helen M Regan, Janet Franklin. 2024. How far can I extrapolate my species distribution model? Exploring shape, a novel method. Ecography, 2024(3), e06992.

Alexandra D Syphard, Santiago José Elías Velazco, Miranda Brooke Rose, Janet Franklin, Helen M Regan. 2024. The importance of geography in forecasting future fire patterns under climate change. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 121(32), e2310076121.

Miranda Brooke Rose, Santiago José Elías Velazco, Helen M Regan, Alan L Flint, Lorraine E Flint, James H Thorne, Janet Franklin. 2024. Uncertainty in consensus predictions of plant species’ vulnerability to climate change. Diversity and distributions, 30(8), e13898.

2023

Miranda Brooke Rose. 2023. Geography of Plant Exposure to Global Change in the California Floristic Province. University of California, Riverside.

Advyth Ramachandran, Jared D Huxley, Shane McFaul, Lisa Schauer, Jeff Diez, Rohan Boone, Tesa Madsen-Hepp, Erin McCann, Janet Franklin, Danielle Logan, others. 2023. Integrating ontogeny and ontogenetic dependency into community assembly. Journal of Ecology, 111(7), 1561–1574.

Miranda Brooke Rose, Mystyn Mills, Janet Franklin, Loralee Larios. 2023. Mapping fractional vegetation cover using unoccupied aerial vehicle imagery to guide conservation of a rare riparian shrub ecosystem in Southern California. Remote Sensing, 15(21), 5113.

Gregory A Backus, Miranda Brooke Rose, Santiago José Elías Velazco, Janet Franklin, Alexandra D Syphard, Helen M Regan. 2023. Modeling the effects of spatially explicit patterns of climate and fire on future populations of a fire-dependent plant. Frontiers in Ecology and Evolution, 11, 1149509.

Miranda Brooke Rose, Santiago José Elías Velazco, Helen M Regan, Janet Franklin. 2023. Rarity, geography, and plant exposure to global change in the California Floristic Province. Global Ecology and Biogeography, 32(2), 218–232.

2022

Santiago José Elías Velazco, Miranda Brooke Rose, André Felipe Alves de Andrade, Ignacio Minoli, Janet Franklin. 2022. flexsdm: An r package for supporting a comprehensive and flexible species distribution modelling workflow. Methods in Ecology and Evolution, 13(8), 1661–1669.

2021

M Brooke Rose, Nicholas N Nagle. 2021. Characterizing forest dynamics with Landsat-derived phenology curves. Remote Sensing, 13(2), 267.

2019

Nicholas N Nagle, Todd A Schroeder, Brooke Rose. 2019. A regularized raking estimator for small-area mapping from forest inventory surveys. Forests, 10(11), 1045.
